Instruction: Walk straight along the reddish paved path, keeping the trees on your left and the road on your right. Pass a signpost with multiple directional arrows. Continue straight under the streetlights, heading towards a tall building with blue illuminated letters in the distance on your right. Approach a yellow-striped crosswalk on the path, marked by a blue circular sign and a red triangular sign. Cross the crosswalk and stop near the white car parked on the right side of the path. This is your destination.
